raw_consumer_statement: I purchased tickets from XXXX, but the reseller canceled my transaction and never refunded my money. I am now living overseas and the company, despite having all my contact information ( email, Portal access, etc ) have not tried to reach out to me and have closed my account. I emailed the President of the company but they haven't provided any status update.They claim that they provided a phone number in their response but there was no phone number provided. I have not been given any further information, and the purchase is still accumulating interest and I am still responsible for the amount. I have provided them with screenshots of the purchase and the cancelation, to no avail.
